docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROMERO, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT ALCANTAR, DINA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-20-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-20-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. THE PLAINTIFF AND THE DEFENDANT WERE ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER MARGO SEELY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-20-2016 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ALCANTAR, DINA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $65.00 SERVED JUL-05-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ALCANTAR, DINA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ROMERO, JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT ALCANTAR, DINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROMERO, JOSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ALCANTAR, DINA $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $180.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $430.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2016 - APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUL-20-2016 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. JUDGE DON MITCHELL, CLERK L. FONG. NOT REPORTED. (306)
